info.name: Bata Call Analytics Insights API
info.description: API collection for the Bata Call Analytics Dashboard. All endpoints pull directly from the PostgreSQL bata_master and bata_insights tables.

request.description: Returns distinct Regions (State/City/Area) and Stores (Business ID, Name, GMB Code) to populate global dropdowns.
Returns all KPIs for the Overview page: total calls, answered/missed counts, trends (28 days), purpose donut, product/customer distribution, sentiment trend, AI insights summary.

ai_insights: Customer exhibited high intent by confirming product availability and store location
Agent missed opportunity to suggest store visit or alternative products
No upselling or cross-selling attempts detected
Zero-call stores in the last 7 days: 113 — review Google Listings and store discoverability.

request.description: Returns Store Performance KPIs: active_stores, avg_calls_per_day_per_store, zero_call_stores, 28-day trends, zero-call store list with last-call date and estimated revenue loss, zero-call insights by region.

recommendations: Review Google Business listings for 113 Tamil Nadu stores
Check phone line connectivity in Tier-2 cities
Schedule staff training for call handling

request.description: Returns Product & Audience KPIs: category performance (Footwear/Accessories/Bags), brand interest, audience segmentation (new/returning), geographic demand by state.
Returns Customer Issues KPIs: issue type breakdown (6 categories), issues by region (5 regions), issues by product category, resolution rate, repeat issue rate, reported-vs-resolved dual trend.

Paginated call log for the Call Review table. Each item includes: call_uuid, timestamp, store_name, AI summary, caller_type (New/Returning), intent, outcome, duration, sentiment, recording_url, transcript_url.
Returns ranked list of stores with: store_name, brand, total_calls, answered/missed counts, high_intent, stockout, avg_per_day, composite score.
